name: Result
description: Full-page success/error/info status screen with actions.

api.name: Result
api.description: Full-page success/error/info status screen with actions.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

examples.title: Success
examples.code:
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Success" Title="Payment Successful" SubTitle="Order confirmed.">
    <Extra>
        <Button>Go to Dashboard</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">View Order</Button>
    </Extra>
</Result>

examples.title: Error
examples.code:
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Error" Title="Submission Failed" SubTitle="Please check and try again.">
    <Extra>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">Retry</Button>
    </Extra>
</Result>

examples.title: All Statuses
examples.code:
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Warning" Title="Warning" SubTitle="Proceed with caution." />
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Info" Title="Information" SubTitle="Useful info." />
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.NotFound" Title="404 Not Found" SubTitle="Page does not exist." />
<Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Forbidden" Title="403 Forbidden" SubTitle="No permission." />

examples.title: Status — interactive
examples.code: <Result Status="Result.ResultStatus.Success" Title="Success Result" SubTitle="This is a success result page." />

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Result

Full-page success/error/info status screen with actions.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/result

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Result | Status | `ResultStatus` | `ResultStatus.Info` |  |
| Result | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| Result | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| Result | SubTitle | `string?` | `` |  |
| Result | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| Result | Extra | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Result | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Result | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (Result) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.
- `Extra` (Result) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Result />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Result/Result.razor`
